title: INT-Telemetry Stage-1 Task Traffic Dataset
description: CSV rows or JSON task objects that inject deterministic workload into the Walker/LEO operational simulation.

task_id.description: Stable task or flow identifier. Duplicate IDs are allowed only as warnings and should be avoided for reproducible experiments.

time.description: Optional human-readable start time. Accepted forms include a slice index, T0/T1, or minute text such as 15min.

start_slice.description: First simulation time slice where this task becomes active.

duration_slices.description: Number of time slices during which the task remains active.

source.description: Source satellite node for routed traffic tasks.

target.description: Target satellite node for routed traffic tasks.

node_id.description: Single satellite node that receives local compute/storage work.

compute_units.description: CPU workload units consumed by the task while active.

gpu_units.description: Optional GPU workload units consumed by the task while active.

traffic_mbps.description: Traffic demand injected into the shortest-path route in Mbps.

priority.description: Task priority. Higher values receive capacity first when multiple routed tasks contend for a congested link; path selection remains shortest-path.

task_type.description: Task label such as compute, mixed, routing, telemetry, burst, background, or downlink. telemetry tasks add source-side telemetry sampling pressure after carried traffic is delivered; downlink tasks add target-side report/cache pressure.
